title: Herb Grinders, Grinder for Dry Herb Portable Zinc Alloy Metal Grinder,Black,5x4cm/2x1.6inch
features: EFFICIENT GRINDER & FILTER : There are improvement sharp curved teeth with your herb spice grinder,make grinder smoothly and efficiently.
STRONG MAGNET LID : The lid is magnetized ,keep lock during working and helps considerably to reduce spilling.
HIGH QUALITY & DURABILITY: Made of premium zinc alloy,high quality material make your mini herb grinder durable.
WIDE USAGE: With the improvement of the sharp curved teeth, the grinder can cut and flutter most herbs and smoothly rotates. It's better that the herbs are dry.
description: Product Description Our herb grinder for herbs has sharp cutting teeth to easily grind up your herbal spices for your convenience. Note: This grinder can not be used to grind most spices into powder. If you want to grind the herbs thoroughly you can reverse the grinder and grind them a little longer so that the herbs won't fall down before they were small enough. Decomposition Display The mill is made of robust, high quality zinc alloy for optimum performance and durability. The classic 4-piece, 3-chamber design allows for grinding, storing and filtering of pollen. It has diamond shaped grinding teeth Allows easy rotation for slicing and pounding herbs Notes on use Attention This griner does not work with flax seeds, fennel seeds, pepper seeds and other spoces with haed shell Easy to use and clean: you can assemble this grinder set to suit your needs. To clean, you can use warm water and a toothbrush, then wipe dry and keep it dry. Dishwasher safe
